name: Authenticated search on RuTracker

falsifiability_protocol.mutation_step: Throw IllegalStateException("rehearsal") at the top of search().
falsifiability_protocol.expected_failure: Result row never renders; SearchResult screen shows 'Search failed' error UI; assertion 'seeders' visible fails on timeout.
falsifiability_protocol.expected_assertion_message_substring: Failed to assertWaitUntil: condition not met within 30000ms

operator_run_instructions: Connect a physical Android device with internet access.
Capture screenshots: (a) authenticated 'Logged in' badge, (b) search result list with at least one row showing size + seeders.
Perform the falsifiability mutation, re-run, capture failure assertion verbatim, revert.
